feat.name: Reactive Resilience
feat.text: Your power blunts blades and weakens spells like the hardiest of dragon scales. You gain resistance to the triggering damage equal to your level. Channel Draconic Essence ends.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
